data.name: DuplicateObjectName
data.value: "{0}" could not be added because an object with the same name already exists.

data.name: InstanceEditorError
data.value: An error occurred while presenting the instance editor for {0}:\r\n{1}

data.name: CloseMapConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to close this map?

data.name: FinalizeFootholdsConfirm
data.value: This will finalize all footholds, remove their tile bindings, and clear the Undo/Redo list.\r\nContinue?

data.name: MinimapRegenerationError
data.value: An error occurred while regenerating the minimap. The error was logged. If possible, save the map and report it on GitHub.

data.name: HelpFileMissing
data.value: Help could not be shown because HRHelp.htm was not found.

data.name: ImgFilesystemPathUnknown
data.value: Unable to determine the IMG filesystem path.\n\nUse HaRepacker to pack IMG files into WZ.

data.name: RemoveVrConfirm
data.value: This will remove the map's VR. This cannot be undone; VR must be re-added from the map menu. Continue?

data.name: RemoveMinimapConfirm
data.value: This will remove the map's minimap. This cannot be undone; the minimap must be re-added from the map menu. Continue?

data.name: ClipboardInvalid
data.value: Clipboard data is unavailable or invalid.

data.name: ClipboardDifferentTileSets
data.value: The clipboard contains tiles from different tile sets and cannot be pasted.

data.name: ClipboardNoLayerSelected
data.value: The clipboard contains layered items, but no layer or platform is selected.

data.name: ClipboardTileSetMismatch
data.value: The clipboard tile uses a different tile set than the selected layer.

data.name: RecoveryPrompt
data.value: HaCreator shut down unexpectedly and can recover automatically from a backup. Proceed?\r\n\r\n(To start from scratch, select No.)

data.name: UnsupportedMapFeature
data.value: This map contains the unsupported feature "{0}". HaCreator will preserve its original data byte-for-byte, but it may stop working if it depends on edited map objects such as footholds or mobs.

data.name: MapSizeMissing
data.value: The map has no size information, and HaCreator could not generate it. The error was logged.

data.name: Context_LoadTargetMap
data.value: Load target map in a new tab
